title: Nursery Rhyme. DCIV. Local.
content:
A man went a hunting at Reigate,
        And wished to leap over a high gate;
        Says the owner, "Go round,
        With your gun and your hound,
        For you never shall leap over my gate."
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCIV. Local." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
